XML error: cv 
   doesn't correspond to any field in type ModMetaDataInternal. Context: <ModMetaData><name>Alven Lewd Style</name><author>delzarin</author><packageId>delzarin.AlvenLewdStyle</packageId><supportedVersions><li>1.6</li></supportedVersions>cv 
  <modDependencies><li><packageId>Ludeon.RimWorld.Ideology</packageId><displayName>Ideology</displayName></li></modDependencies><loadAfter><li>Ludeon.RimWorld.Ideology</li></loadAfter><description>Adds a new ideology style: [b]Alven[/b].
  
This style brings an ancient, nature-inspired aesthetic to your colony. Deeply rooted in a [b]matriarchal culture[/b], the Alven style celebrates the grace and strength of the feminine form.

[h1]Features[/h1]
The mod includes a massive collection of retextures and new items:

[list]
[*] [b]Sculptures:[/b] Over 70 new textures!
- 28 Small Sculptures
- 22 Large Sculptures
- 20 Grand Sculptures
Many of these feature elegant female figures and portraits in the Alven tradition.

[*] [b]Floor Decorations:[/b] 58 variants of stone reliefs (Slabs) to decorate your halls.
- 17 Broad Slabs
- 18 Medium Slabs
- 23 Rectangular (Long) Slabs

[*] [b]Architecture &amp; Furniture:[/b]
- [b]Caryatid Columns:[/b] Beautiful statues of Elven women supporting the roof.
- Elegant Tables (1x2, 2x2, 2x4, 3x3)
- Stylized Doors and Autodoors
- Fine and Luxury Tiles

[*] [b]Ritual Items:[/b]
- 4 Unique Ideograms
- Styled Lectern, Kneeling Sheet, and Kneeling Pillow
[/list]

[h1]Credits &amp; Inspiration[/h1]
[b]Art Sources:[/b]
Textures include assets sourced from rule34, featuring works by talented artists such as [b]personalami[/b] and [b]nordvalkyrie[/b].

[b]Inspiration:[/b]
This mod was heavily inspired by the amazing works of [b]Alpenglow[/b] and [b]AKawaiiTent[/b]. I wanted to create a middle ground between their distinct styles, adding a touch of [b]Gerrymon[/b]'s influence and a unique matriarchal Elven vibe.

Thank you to the RimJobWorld modding community for the inspiration!
  </description></ModMetaData>

XML error: cv 
   doesn't correspond to any field in type ModMetaDataInternal. Context: <ModMetaData><name>Alven Lewd Style</name><author>delzarin</author><packageId>delzarin.AlvenLewdStyle</packageId><supportedVersions><li>1.6</li></supportedVersions>cv 
  <modDependencies><li><packageId>Ludeon.RimWorld.Ideology</packageId><displayName>Ideology</displayName></li></modDependencies><loadAfter><li>Ludeon.RimWorld.Ideology</li></loadAfter><description>Adds a new ideology style: [b]Alven[/b].
  
This style brings an ancient, nature-inspired aesthetic to your colony. Deeply rooted in a [b]matriarchal culture[/b], the Alven style celebrates the grace and strength of the feminine form.

[h1]Features[/h1]
The mod includes a massive collection of retextures and new items:

[list]
[*] [b]Sculptures:[/b] Over 70 new textures!
- 28 Small Sculptures
- 22 Large Sculptures
- 20 Grand Sculptures
Many of these feature elegant female figures and portraits in the Alven tradition.

[*] [b]Floor Decorations:[/b] 58 variants of stone reliefs (Slabs) to decorate your halls.
- 17 Broad Slabs
- 18 Medium Slabs
- 23 Rectangular (Long) Slabs

[*] [b]Architecture &amp; Furniture:[/b]
- [b]Caryatid Columns:[/b] Beautiful statues of Elven women supporting the roof.
- Elegant Tables (1x2, 2x2, 2x4, 3x3)
- Stylized Doors and Autodoors
- Fine and Luxury Tiles

[*] [b]Ritual Items:[/b]
- 4 Unique Ideograms
- Styled Lectern, Kneeling Sheet, and Kneeling Pillow
[/list]

[h1]Credits &amp; Inspiration[/h1]
[b]Art Sources:[/b]
Textures include assets sourced from rule34, featuring works by talented artists such as [b]personalami[/b] and [b]nordvalkyrie[/b].

[b]Inspiration:[/b]
This mod was heavily inspired by the amazing works of [b]Alpenglow[/b] and [b]AKawaiiTent[/b]. I wanted to create a middle ground between their distinct styles, adding a touch of [b]Gerrymon[/b]'s influence and a unique matriarchal Elven vibe.

Thank you to the RimJobWorld modding community for the inspiration!
  </description></ModMetaData>

[MiliraImperium]米莉拉帝国第14舰队准备跃迁于3、2、1…
第一舰队主宰战舰的档案馆里没有任何秘密...
[MiliraImperium]米莉拉帝国第14舰队已抵达目标恒星系，感谢您的配合。
米莉拉帝国审判庭战舰正在跃迁…
跃迁完成...正在飞跃殖民地上空...
正在拦截暗黑超凡对现实位面的干预…
拦截完成，本次行动拯救了2941名绮罗族。
[MiliraImperium]年轻的米莉拉海盗获取了逆重飞船控制权…
[MiliraImperium]“走吧，帕拉丁，我们回家。”
[MiliraImperium] Melee Animation compatibility patch applied successfully.
[MiliraImperium]莉迪亚正在漫步于画中世界艾蕾德尔…
有人在此说下悄悄话...
“潮起潮落，聚散离合。四海星辰，皆随我意。”
虚构的米莉拉按理说是不存在的，他的存在对于这个世界上的居民来说是一种幻象。
莉迪亚收拾好了行装，准备继续她的旅途。
有善良人出没…
并非善良。
暗黑超凡正在观察着莉迪亚…
霍拉克斯对莉迪亚悄悄降下了赐福。
